notes.text: Text pasted into Naver SmartEditor and saved as temporary draft; temp draft count observed as 4.

Browser image clipboard paste succeeded, but direct click on long placeholder split the placeholder text; image insertion was undone and temp draft resaved clean. Next adapter should use short image anchors or toolbar upload.
Temporary Naver draft exists in SmartEditor; generator now uses short image anchors for future image replacement.

Agent handoff 2026-05-26: package validation passed with 23 assets, 14 body images, 0 asset errors, 80 collected comments, 1 YouTube, 6 videos. Current blocker is Naver SmartEditor image placement after text temp-save. Do not refetch or downgrade the ledger unless source refresh is explicitly requested. Use naver_editor_clipboard.txt with short [[IMG_001]] anchors, then replace anchors using editor_upload_plan.json; verify every inserted image position before private/public publishing. NAVER_ACCESS_TOKEN is not configured, so API private publish needs OAuth/token setup first. Public release still requires human review.

2026-05-26 adapter work: generated browser_editor_payload.json and added validation for SmartEditor anchors/assets. Browser coordinate/find replacement tests were reverted; do not use coordinate-only image placement as the primary adapter. Internal Naver editor routes observed: RabbitTempPostWrite, RabbitTempPostUpdate, RabbitWrite, PostWriteFormManagerOptions.
Browser draft resaved clean after reverted image-placement tests: imgCount=0, original long placeholders remain in current Naver temp draft.
Clean Naver SmartEditor temporary draft created/refreshed from browser_editor_payload.json with short anchors [[IMG_001]]..[[IMG_004]], long placeholders removed, no images inserted yet.

Naver SmartEditor temp draft now has 4 inline uploaded images, 0 remaining [[IMG_*]] anchors, 0 long placeholders. Successful adapter method: click exact short anchor, Home, Shift+End, paste image from clipboard.

Image-position verification passed in current Naver SmartEditor draft: allOk=true, imageCount=4, remaining short anchors=0, long placeholders=0. Verification saved to naver_editor_verification.json. Public publishing remains blocked until human review.
Private Naver post published after image-position verification. Browser confirmed visible post state: 방금 전 · 비공개. Public publishing remains blocked until human review.
